_comment: Bot settings only — credentials go in credentials.json.
_safety: Set demo to true to paper-trade. Start there before going live.
_scan_note: scan_all_markets=false scans only target_series (fast, historically where trades came from). Set true to paginate EVERY open market (~600k, slow). max_markets_per_scan=0 means no cap.
_value_note: PRIMARY strategy (valuation.py): buys markets priced modestly below their calibrated historical fair value, expecting reversion. Skips trending markets (wide anchor range), big gaps (=news, not noise), and untraded markets. value_sharpen=favorite-longshot correction (1.0=off).
_strategies_note: Analytic per-market strategies. ARBS=risk-free bonus. SPREAD/DRIFT/MOMENTUM/FAVORITE=directional heuristics (off by default now that VALUE is primary).
_event_arb_note: Risk-free multi-leg detector; logs to arb_alerts.jsonl, does not auto-trade.
